conditions.description: Participation is limited to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded from participation unless adequate guarantees are provided.
Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.
Maximum EU contribution per project is €19,000,000.
Where Financial Support to Third Parties (FSTP) is utilised, the maximum financial support per third party across all FSTP stages is €2,550,000.

Minimum consortium composition requirements (minimum number of legal entities, entity types, and minimum number of distinct EU member state or associated country representations) are not explicitly stated in the topic text or call extract.
conditions.conflict_note: The topic text in the slice.json carries an empty 'eligibility_conditions' field and the curated call extract does not state minimum consortium size or composition requirements. Standard Horizon Europe RIA consortium requirements (typically a minimum of three legal entities from three different member states or associated countries per General Annex A) are structurally expected but cannot be confirmed from the declared input documents for this skill invocation. This condition must be resolved against Tier 1 General Annex documents before the compliance profile can be finalised.
